# Datasets and Input Requirements

## Minimum inputs for MVP

- Product brief.
- Claim bank.
- Landing page URL list.
- Approved offer list.
- Buyer persona list.
- Channel budget caps.
- Brand voice rules.
- Prohibited claims/terms.
- Event taxonomy.

## Better inputs

- Sales-call transcripts.
- Support tickets.
- Customer reviews.
- Competitor pages.
- Search query reports.
- CRM outcomes.
- Trial activation events.
- Churn reasons.
- Pricing objections.
- Security questionnaire answers.

## Input quality scores

| Score | State | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Weak | Founder opinion only |
| 2 | Basic | Product facts and rough ICP |
| 3 | Usable | Claim bank + proof + buyer states |
| 4 | Strong | VOC + analytics + experiments |
| 5 | Excellent | Causal tests + CRM/product outcomes + learning memory |

## Data preparation

- De-identify customer data.
- Remove secrets.
- Normalize product terminology.
- Attach source URLs.
- Mark stale data.
- Separate fact from opinion.
- Tag claims and proof.

## Mindset

The factory's output quality is capped by input truth quality.
